message:
feat(fwc): add workflow resolution loop, ask command, and binding invalidation

Implement the "resolve" phase of the fwc workflow lifecycle, enabling
iterative draft binding resolution, identifier candidate discovery, and
clarification prompting before execution.

New commands:
- fwc task resolve <id>: run a single resolution pass that discovers
  draft bindings, identifier candidates, and evidence
- fwc task resolve <id> --until ready: iterate up to 4 passes until
  the capsule is execution-ready or blocked on a question
- fwc task ask <id>: return the smallest pending clarification question

Resolution system (workflow.rs):
- ResolutionState with draft_bindings, identifier_candidates, evidence,
  pending_question (ClarificationPrompt), and history (ResolutionReceipt)
- ResolutionPatch computed per pass with merged effective_bindings
- AppliedResolution returned from TaskStore::append_resolution() with
  receipt tracking changes, pass count, stop reason
- Binding invalidation: changing connector/zone resets resolution state,
  approval, and execution history; changing a regular binding clears
  conflicting draft/candidate entries and resets approval

Main dispatch (main.rs):
- task_resolve_dispatch with multi-pass loop, stop reasons (ready,
  pending-question, single-pass, no-further-progress, iteration-cap)
- task_ask_dispatch returning pending question or "no questions" status
- task_payload_view() for consistent task serialization
- ResolveUntil enum and TaskResolveArgs with --until/--until-ready

Other improvements:
- catalog.rs: expanded connector catalog entries
- intent.rs: intent compilation refinements
- policy_bundle_flow.sh: minor script adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@ STEP_CONTEXT="null"
 if [[ -n "${CARGO_CMD:-}" ]]; then
   read -r -a CARGO_CMD_ARR <<< "${CARGO_CMD}"
 elif command -v rch >/dev/null 2>&1; then
-  CARGO_CMD_ARR=(env TMPDIR=/tmp rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=.target-policy-bundle-flow cargo)
+  CARGO_CMD_ARR=(env TMPDIR=/tmp rch exec -- env FCP_POLICY_BUNDLE_E2E_PRINT_JSONL=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=.target-policy-bundle-flow cargo)
 else
   CARGO_CMD_ARR=(cargo)
 fi
@@ -144,7 +144,7 @@ step_run_bundle_flow_test() {
       "${CARGO_CMD_ARR[@]}" test -p fcp-cli --test policy_e2e_test \
       e2e_policy_bundle_apply_and_rollback_flow -- --nocapture
   ) 2>&1 | tee "${RAW_OUTPUT}"
-  awk '/^\{"timestamp":/ { print }' "${RAW_OUTPUT}" > "${DETAIL_JSONL}"
+  awk '/^\{.*"test_name":"e2e_policy_bundle_apply_and_rollback_flow"/ { print }' "${RAW_OUTPUT}" > "${DETAIL_JSONL}"
   [[ -s "${DETAIL_JSONL}" ]]
   cat "${DETAIL_JSONL}" >> "${LOG_JSONL}"
 }
